## Checklist

- [ ] Uses only fictional test data.
- [ ] Adds no credentials, meeting content, media, vault/database files, or personal paths.
- [ ] Keeps provider-specific types inside provider adapters.
- [ ] Updates documentation and i18n resources when behavior or user-visible text changes.
